top_signals.title: Apollo’s Slok Says S&P 493’s Stalled Margins Are a Big-Tech Risk
top_signals.summary: Apollo Global Management Inc.’s Torsten Slok warned that companies outside the giants of the technology sector are failing to show gains in profitability from their spending on artificial intelligence, posing risks to Big Tech valuations.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Angola Seeks to Raise About $320 Million in Nation’s Biggest IPO
top_signals.summary: Angola plans to raise as much as $320 million selling shares in Unitel SA, the country’s biggest telecommunications operator, to help finance its budget and deepen the oil-rich nation’s capital markets.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: Commercial Ships Hit in Hormuz Missile Attacks
top_signals.summary: Iran's Revolutionary Guards fired at least two missiles at commercial ships transiting through the Strait of Hormuz on Monday night, Axios reported, citing two U.S. officials.Two commercial ships suffered significant damage but had no casualties, the report said, citing a U.S.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Three New ETFs to Watch
top_signals.summary: The SpaceX IPO set off a predictable frenzy—we look at who may lead the pack. Also, betting against AI, high-yield bonds, plus bonus mentions.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.summary: Officials say move intended to boost lending and support financial markets in a crisis
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: The GitHub Actions Attack Pattern Your CI Security Scanners Miss
top_signals.summary: ActiveState explains how GitHub Actions attack chains can evade traditional CI security scanners, why passing a scan doesn't guarantee a secure pipeline, and how organizations can better govern their CI/CD workflows. [...]
